sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n863" key="a)grio/boulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγριό-βουλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n863.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wild of purpose</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
